response.justification: Bogdan brings 13+ years of software craftsmanship across a broad polyglot stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) with solid fundamentals in TDD, distributed/low-latency systems at Sociomantic, and demonstrated ability to ship platform-level work (GISCollective, MCP tooling). However, the resume shows no explicit experience with experimentation platforms, feature flighting, A/B testing frameworks, statistical analysis, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure — the core of this Principal IC6 role. Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) and lack of evidence leading multi-team, cross-org growth initiatives also fall short of IC6 expectations.
strengths: Polyglot engineer with production experience in high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems (Sociomantic millions of req/s)
Strong software-craftsmanship foundation: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source platform ownership
Hands-on across full stack plus emerging AI-agent/MCP tooling work aligned with AI-first engineering
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation frameworks, feature flags, or A/B testing platforms
Missing evidence of telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis depth
Career level (Senior/Staff) and scope of cross-team influence appear below Principal/IC6 bar

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and polyglot engineering depth
Seniority and cross-org leadership scope below IC6
